positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos_problem.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos_problem.tptp
1. is_music_piece(symphony_no_9) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0,X1] : ((writes(X0,X1) & is_music_piece(X1)) => composer(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. writes(beethoven,symphony_no_9) [input(axiom)]
9. composer(beethoven) [input(conjecture)]
10. ~composer(beethoven) [negated conjecture 9]
11. ~composer(beethoven) [flattening 10]
17. ! [X0,X1] : (composer(X0) | (~writes(X0,X1) | ~is_music_piece(X1))) [ennf transformation 2]
18. ! [X0,X1] : (composer(X0) | ~writes(X0,X1) | ~is_music_piece(X1)) [flattening 17]
19. is_music_piece(symphony_no_9) [cnf transformation 1]
20. ~writes(X0,X1) | composer(X0) | ~is_music_piece(X1) [cnf transformation 18]
21. writes(beethoven,symphony_no_9) [cnf transformation 3]
25. ~composer(beethoven) [cnf transformation 11]
26. composer(beethoven) | ~is_music_piece(symphony_no_9) [resolution 20,21]
27. ~is_music_piece(symphony_no_9) [forward subsumption resolution 26,25]
28. $false [forward subsumption resolution 27,19]
% SZS output end Proof for pos_problem.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg_problem.tptp

cnf(u23,axiom,
    symphony_no_9 != vienna_music_society).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    symphony_no_9 != beethoven).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    beethoven != vienna_music_society).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_music_piece(X0) := $true
for all inputs,

for all inputs,
    define composer(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define premiered(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,

for all inputs,

for all inputs,
